entry.value: Class: Rule Id/Name: Workflow Trigger Rule Action: run in Debug Object Browser by User spadmin

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> <!DOCTYPE ProvisioningPlan PUBLIC "sailpoint.dtd" "sailpoint.dtd"> <ProvisioningPlan> <AccountRequest application="ActiveDirectory" op="Create"> <AttributeRequest name="memberOf" op="Add" value="CN=AccountsPayable,OU=Groups,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com"/> <AttributeRequest name="memberOf" op="Add" value="CN=AccountsReceivable,OU=Groups,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com"/> </AccountRequest> </ProvisioningPlan>
